nasb.text: The fords also have been seized, And they have burned the marshes with fire, And the men of war are terrified.

esv.text: the fords have been seized, the marshes are burned with fire, and the soldiers are in panic.

cnv.text: 渡口已經被佔據了， 生滿蘆葦的沼澤也被火燒了， 軍兵都驚慌失措。”

ccb.text: 渡口被占， 沼泽地被烧， 战士惊慌失措。’”
